element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Player learns basic navigation and dialogue in familiar institutional setting
Player begins experiencing otherworldly locations; uncertainty about real vs. imaginary
Introduction to hostile NPCs and malevolent supernatural presence
Player adapts to role-playing different personas within chapters
Science fiction threat escalation within horror framework
Player realizes all experiences are imaginary; must solve the psychological core

element_introduction_order.element: Final challenge path (escape before IV removal)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Timed skill test to break from coma; escape mechanics revealed at climax

typical_relief_triggers: Return to asylum grounds between chapters
Game over recovery (no progress loss) reduces stakes perception
typical_tension_triggers: Encounter with malevolent entity (Mother, squid creature)
Final challenge path with obstacle avoidance
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Chapter-based episodic structure with escalating supernatural intensity. Each chapter presents distinct atmospheric theme. Tension builds through environmental storytelling and NPC interactions, then releases via cinematics transitioning to next chapter. Meta-narrative revelation compresses final tension before climactic escape sequence.

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introductory puzzle and exploration phase in asylum. Low mechanical difficulty; focus on narrative comprehension and basic navigation in isometric space
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Escalating puzzle complexity across diverse environments. Introduction of obstacle avoidance in final paths of chapters. Environmental hazards increase as identity shifts introduce disorientation
difficulty_curve.late_game: Convergence of all mechanics toward meta-puzzle realization. Final challenge path requires sustained obstacle avoidance under time pressure (IV line context). Psychological rather than mechanical difficulty dominates
notable_spikes: Transition from asylum to malformed children town (first supernatural reality shift)
Demented circus chapter (environmental chaos + hostile squid entity)
Final awakening sequence (timed escape component introduced)

notable_level_patterns.description: Each chapter/episode presents a self-contained otherworldly location with distinct visual style, atmosphere, and narrative flavor. Player enters, solves location-specific puzzles, confronts chapter antagonist or challenge, then experiences cinematic transition.
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Malformed children town (overseen by Mother), Demented circus (squid entity), Alien hive, Aztec village

notable_level_patterns.description: Between chapters, player returns to sanitarium grounds as anchor point. Functions as relief valve and narrative reorientation. Blends real and unreal, moving player closer to truth about Dr. Morgan.

Player assumed alternate identity within certain episodes (Sarah as younger sister, Grimwall as comic hero). Mechanics and perspective shift with identity to disorient player, reinforcing psychological horror and coma theme.

Concluding segment of each chapter requires navigating a path while avoiding obstacles. Failure returns to path start without progress loss. Introduced mechanically in early chapters, becomes meta-commentary on escape in finale.
